snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вАЛвАЛ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвАЛвАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit вАФ stripped-down sets, an intimate setting вАФ just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts вАФ which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago вАФ you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday вАФ the track will feature guest vocals from GIVE≈МN and Daniel Caesar вАФ just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

snippet.title: "To Begin Again" - Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
To Begin Again Merch Collection is here! https://shop.ingridmichaelson.com/

Lyric Video by Kelly Ford
Cover Illustration by Milkglass 

вАЬTo Begin AgainвАЭ Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and ZAYN
Produced by Sam de Jong
Mixed by Rob Kinelski
Mastered by Emily Lazar

Lyrics:
When the world was ending
IвАЩd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places weвАЩd never been
When the world was ending
WeвАЩd hold on to the past
Because itвАЩs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened

And, itвАЩs alright
ItвАЩs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I donвАЩt know how
I donвАЩt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that weвАЩd play
So far from comprehending
TheyвАЩd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened

And, itвАЩs alright
ItвАЩs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I donвАЩt know how
I donвАЩt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

And cry because IвАЩm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on

ItвАЩs alright
ItвАЩs ok
We will get another day
 
I donвАЩt know how
I donвАЩt know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again
To begin to live and love and breathe again

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвАЩs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Recap
snippet.description:
On March 3, Starship serial number 10 (SN10) completed SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype as it successfully ascended, transitioned propellant, and reoriented itself for reentry and an active aerodynamic controlled descent. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines reignited to perform the vehicleвАЩs landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad.

Test flights such as SN10вАЩs are about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ЎІўДЎ£ўИўД ўДЎІЎ®ўЖЎ™ўЗЎІ Ў•ўКўДЎІ (Ў•ўДЎІўКЎѓЎІ Ў£ўДўКЎіЎІўЖ) ўДўКЎ≥ ЎЈЎІўДЎ®ЎІ ЎђЎІўЕЎєўКЎІ ўБўК ЎєўЕЎ±ўЗЎІЎМ ўИўДўГўЖўЗ Ў±Ў¶ўКЎ≥ ўИЎІўДЎѓўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІўДЎЇ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎєўЕЎ± 35 ЎєЎІўЕўЛЎІЎМ ўИЎІўДЎ∞ўК ЎєўДўЙ ўИЎіўГ ЎІўДЎ≤ўИЎІЎђ ўЕўЖ ўБЎ™ЎІЎ© Ў£ЎЃЎ±ўЙ.
 ўДЎІ Ў™Ў≥Ў™ЎЈўКЎє Ў®ЎІўЗЎІЎ±ўЕўЗўЕЎІ ўБЎєўДЎ™ЎМ ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™Ў≠ЎІўИўД Ў•ўЖўВЎІЎ∞ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ™ўЗЎІ ўЕўЖ ўЗЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДЎєўДЎІўВЎ© ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎЈЎ¶Ў©ЎМЎ£ўЖ Ў™ўЕўЖЎє ўЕЎІ Ў≥ўКЎ≠ЎѓЎЂ. Ў™Ў™ЎЇўКЎ± Ў≠ўКЎІЎ© Ў®ЎІўЗЎІЎ± ўИЎєЎІЎ¶ўДЎ™ўЗЎІ Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£Ў®Ўѓ ўБўК ЎєўКЎѓ ўЕўКўДЎІЎѓ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ™ўЗЎІ Ў•ўКўДЎІ ЎІўДЎ™ЎІЎ≥Ўє ЎєЎіЎ±.

This is an authentic Latin pop number made in collaboration with Guaynaa (Jean Carlos Santiago) who has been named an artist to look out for in 2020 by the Billboard Magazine. The British producer from Zimbabwe, Rationale and the Columbian songwriter Laura Carvajalino Avila created this primal and inexhaustible production. And CHUNG HAвАЩs interpretation and expression that fully immerses into genres shows her many talents as diva that answers to this age of glocal sounds.

snippet.title: Forspoken вАУ Official Title Announcement | PS5
snippet.description:
Introducing Forspoken, The New Narrative-Driven Adventure Set in a Beautiful Yet Cruel World.

Play as Frey Holland, a young woman who must harness her magical abilities to survive in a fantastical yet dangerous world of Athia.

Enjoy this sneak peak of new exhilarating gameplay and meet actress Ella Balinska, the voice and motion capture artist behind Frey.

Developed by Luminous Productions for the PlayStation¬Ѓ5 system, Forspoken will take players on a magical and perilous journey.

snippet.title: Live Zitout |Ў≤ўКЎ™ўИЎ™ ўЕЎ®ЎІЎіЎ± ЎІўДЎЃўЕўКЎ≥ |18/03/2021
snippet.description:
ўДЎІўКўБ 18 ўЕЎІЎ±Ў≥ 2021 Ў™ЎґўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЖўВЎІЎЈ ЎІўДЎ™ЎІўДўКЎ© :
рЯФі Ў≤ўДЎ≤ЎІўД Ў®ЎђЎІўКЎ© ўИЎђўКЎђўД ўИўЕЎІ ЎђЎІўИЎ±ўЗўЕЎІ ўИЎ™ЎѓЎІЎєўКЎІЎ™ўЗ. 
рЯФі ЎІЎ∞ЎІ ўДўЕ Ў™Ў≠ўД ўЕЎіўГўДЎ© ЎІўДЎіЎ±ЎєўКЎ© ўБўДўЖ Ў™Ў≠ўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃЎ±ўЙ.
рЯФі ўЕЎіўГўДЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥ўКўИўДЎ© ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎЄўЗЎ±Ў™ Ў®ЎєЎѓ Ў™ЎєўКўКўЖ Ў™Ў®ўИўЖ ўДўЕ Ў™ўЖЎ™ўЗўК Ў®ЎєЎѓ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКўЗЎѓўЕ ЎЇЎ±ўБ ўВЎµЎѓўКЎ± ўДўЕўИЎІЎЈўЖўКўЖ ўИўДЎІ ўКўЕўЖЎ≠ўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎ®ЎѓўКўД ўЕЎІЎ∞ЎІ ўКЎ±ўКЎѓ ўДўЗўЕ ЎЇўКЎ± Ў™ўБЎ™ўКЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥Ў±Ў© (ўИўЗЎ±ЎІўЖ) 
рЯФі ЎіЎєўИЎ± ЎєўЕўКўВ ўИўВўЖЎІЎєЎ© Ў±ЎІЎ≥ЎЃЎ© Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎђўЕЎІЎєЎ© ЎІўДЎ≠ЎІўГўЕЎ© ўДўЖ Ў™Ў≥Ў™ЎЈўКЎє Ў≠Ў™ўЙ Ў≠ўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎ®Ў≥ўКЎЈЎ©.
рЯФі ўГўКўБ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЕЎіўГўД Ў≥ўГўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў± ўИўЗўК ЎєЎІЎіЎ± Ў£ўГЎ®Ў± Ў®ўДЎѓ ўЕЎ≥ЎІЎ≠Ў© ўБўК ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўЕ.
рЯФі ўЗўД ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўЕЎє ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ўВЎІўКЎѓўК ўДЎіЎєЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎіЎєЎ® ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™ЎЈЎІўДЎ® Ў®ЎІўДЎІЎ≥Ў™ўВўДЎІўД ЎЯ
рЯФі ЎІўДўЖЎЄЎІўЕ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўК Ў±ўБЎґ ЎІўДЎІЎєЎ™Ў±ЎІўБ Ў®ўА ўГўИЎ≥ўИўБўИ (Ў£ўДЎ®ЎІўЖўКЎІ) ўИЎѓЎєўЕ Ў™ўКўЕўИЎі ЎІўДЎіЎ±ўВўКЎ© ўДўДЎІўЖўБЎЂЎІўД ЎєўЖ ЎІўЖЎѓўИўЖўКЎ≥ўКЎІ ўДўГўЖўЗ ўКЎѓЎєўК Ў™ўВЎ±ўКЎ± ўЕЎµўКЎ± ЎІўДЎµЎ≠Ў±ЎІЎ° ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®ўКЎ© ўИўБўДЎ≥ЎЈўКўЖ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўВЎІўКЎѓ ўЗўИ Ў£ўГЎ®Ў± Ў≠Ў±ўГўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўК.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎ™Ў≠ЎґўКЎ± ўИЎІўДЎ™Ў±Ў™ўКЎ® ўДЎ•Ў±Ў≥ЎІўД ЎІўДЎђўЖўИЎѓ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўКўКўЖ ўДўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎ≠ўД ўДЎµЎІўДЎ≠ ЎІўДўВўИўЙ ЎІўДўГЎ®Ў±ўЙ ўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕЎ±ўКўГЎІ.
рЯФі ЎІўЖЎ™Ў≠ЎІЎ± ЎђўЖЎѓўК ўКЎ≥ўЕўЙ ўИЎІЎ¶ўД Ў®Ў±ўГЎІЎ™.
рЯФі Ў£ўИЎµўК ЎІўДЎҐЎ®ЎІЎ° Ў£ўЖ ўДЎІ ўКЎ±Ў≥ўДўИЎІ Ў£Ў®ўЖЎІЎ¶ўЗўЕ Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ўДЎ£ўЖўЗўЕ Ў≥ўКЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓўЕўИўЖўЗўЕ ўБўК ЎІўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ЎЃЎІЎ±Ўђ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў± ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ўЕЎµЎІўДЎ≠ ўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕЎ±ўКўГЎІ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ЎђўКЎіўЖЎІ ўИўКЎ®ўВўЙ ўБўК Ў®ўДЎІЎѓўЖЎІ.
рЯФі Ў®ўКЎІўЖ Ў™Ў≥ўИўКЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎєЎІЎіЎІЎ™ ўДўЕЎ™ўВЎІЎєЎѓўК ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ўГЎІЎ∞Ў® ўИЎІўДЎѓўДўКўД Ў£ўЖўЗўЕ ўВЎІўЕўИЎІ Ў®ўЗЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДЎЃЎЈўИЎ© ўЕўЖ ўВЎ®ўД ўБўК 2018.
рЯФі Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ўИЎ•ўЖ Ў≠ўДЎ™ Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДўЕЎЈЎІўДЎ® ЎІўДўБЎ¶ўИўКЎ© Ў≥Ў™Ў®ўВўЙ ЎІўДўГЎЂўКЎ± ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ўЕЎЈЎ±ўИЎ≠Ў© ўДўЗЎ∞ЎІ ўЖўВўИўД Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎѓўИўДЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎѓўЖўКЎ© ўЗўК ўЕўЖ Ў≥Ў™Ў≠ўД Ў£ЎЇўДЎ®ўЗЎІ.
рЯФі Ў™ЎєўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎ®ўВ Ў®ўИўЕЎѓўКўЖ Ў®ўЖ ЎєЎ™ўИ ўГўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎіЎІЎ± ўДўДЎѓўБЎІЎє ўИЎІўДЎ£ўЕўЖ ўБўК Ў±Ў¶ЎІЎ≥Ў© ЎІўДЎђўЕўЗўИЎ±ўКЎ©... ўЕўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўДЎЯ
рЯФі ЎІўДўЕЎѓўКЎ± ЎІўДЎєЎІўЕ ўДўДЎ£ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўИЎЈўЖўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўБЎ±ўКЎѓ Ў≤ўКўЖ ЎІўДЎѓўКўЖ Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎіўКЎЃ ўГЎІўЖ ўЕЎ≠ўДўД ўЖўБЎ≥ЎІўЖўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўИўЖ ЎІўДўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© ўИўВЎѓ Ў™ЎѓЎ±Ў® ЎєўЖЎѓ ўИЎ≤ЎІЎ±Ў© ЎІўДЎѓЎІЎЃўДўКЎ© ЎІўДўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© Ў£ўКЎґЎІ ўБўК 2014.
рЯФі Ў•ўЕўГЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў™ЎЇўКўКЎ± ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎЇЎІўЖўК Ў±ЎІЎіЎѓўК Ў®ўА ЎђЎ®ЎІЎ± ўЕўЗўЖўЙ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎЃЎ®ЎІЎ±ЎђўК Ў®ўДЎ≠ўКўЕЎ± ўКўЖЎєЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў±ЎІўГ Ў®ўЕЎІ ўГЎІўЖ ўКўВўИўДўЗ ЎІўДЎ∞Ў®ЎІЎ®.

localized.title: Live Zitout |Ў≤ўКЎ™ўИЎ™ ўЕЎ®ЎІЎіЎ± ЎІўДЎЃўЕўКЎ≥ |18/03/2021
localized.description:
ўДЎІўКўБ 18 ўЕЎІЎ±Ў≥ 2021 Ў™ЎґўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЖўВЎІЎЈ ЎІўДЎ™ЎІўДўКЎ© :
рЯФі Ў≤ўДЎ≤ЎІўД Ў®ЎђЎІўКЎ© ўИЎђўКЎђўД ўИўЕЎІ ЎђЎІўИЎ±ўЗўЕЎІ ўИЎ™ЎѓЎІЎєўКЎІЎ™ўЗ. 
рЯФі ЎІЎ∞ЎІ ўДўЕ Ў™Ў≠ўД ўЕЎіўГўДЎ© ЎІўДЎіЎ±ЎєўКЎ© ўБўДўЖ Ў™Ў≠ўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃЎ±ўЙ.
рЯФі ўЕЎіўГўДЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥ўКўИўДЎ© ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎЄўЗЎ±Ў™ Ў®ЎєЎѓ Ў™ЎєўКўКўЖ Ў™Ў®ўИўЖ ўДўЕ Ў™ўЖЎ™ўЗўК Ў®ЎєЎѓ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКўЗЎѓўЕ ЎЇЎ±ўБ ўВЎµЎѓўКЎ± ўДўЕўИЎІЎЈўЖўКўЖ ўИўДЎІ ўКўЕўЖЎ≠ўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎ®ЎѓўКўД ўЕЎІЎ∞ЎІ ўКЎ±ўКЎѓ ўДўЗўЕ ЎЇўКЎ± Ў™ўБЎ™ўКЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥Ў±Ў© (ўИўЗЎ±ЎІўЖ) 
рЯФі ЎіЎєўИЎ± ЎєўЕўКўВ ўИўВўЖЎІЎєЎ© Ў±ЎІЎ≥ЎЃЎ© Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎђўЕЎІЎєЎ© ЎІўДЎ≠ЎІўГўЕЎ© ўДўЖ Ў™Ў≥Ў™ЎЈўКЎє Ў≠Ў™ўЙ Ў≠ўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎ®Ў≥ўКЎЈЎ©.
рЯФі ўГўКўБ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЕЎіўГўД Ў≥ўГўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў± ўИўЗўК ЎєЎІЎіЎ± Ў£ўГЎ®Ў± Ў®ўДЎѓ ўЕЎ≥ЎІЎ≠Ў© ўБўК ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўЕ.
рЯФі ўЗўД ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўЕЎє ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ўВЎІўКЎѓўК ўДЎіЎєЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎіЎєЎ® ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™ЎЈЎІўДЎ® Ў®ЎІўДЎІЎ≥Ў™ўВўДЎІўД ЎЯ
рЯФі ЎІўДўЖЎЄЎІўЕ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўК Ў±ўБЎґ ЎІўДЎІЎєЎ™Ў±ЎІўБ Ў®ўА ўГўИЎ≥ўИўБўИ (Ў£ўДЎ®ЎІўЖўКЎІ) ўИЎѓЎєўЕ Ў™ўКўЕўИЎі ЎІўДЎіЎ±ўВўКЎ© ўДўДЎІўЖўБЎЂЎІўД ЎєўЖ ЎІўЖЎѓўИўЖўКЎ≥ўКЎІ ўДўГўЖўЗ ўКЎѓЎєўК Ў™ўВЎ±ўКЎ± ўЕЎµўКЎ± ЎІўДЎµЎ≠Ў±ЎІЎ° ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®ўКЎ© ўИўБўДЎ≥ЎЈўКўЖ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўВЎІўКЎѓ ўЗўИ Ў£ўГЎ®Ў± Ў≠Ў±ўГўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўК.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎ™Ў≠ЎґўКЎ± ўИЎІўДЎ™Ў±Ў™ўКЎ® ўДЎ•Ў±Ў≥ЎІўД ЎІўДЎђўЖўИЎѓ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўКўКўЖ ўДўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎ≠ўД ўДЎµЎІўДЎ≠ ЎІўДўВўИўЙ ЎІўДўГЎ®Ў±ўЙ ўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕЎ±ўКўГЎІ.
рЯФі ЎІўЖЎ™Ў≠ЎІЎ± ЎђўЖЎѓўК ўКЎ≥ўЕўЙ ўИЎІЎ¶ўД Ў®Ў±ўГЎІЎ™.
рЯФі Ў£ўИЎµўК ЎІўДЎҐЎ®ЎІЎ° Ў£ўЖ ўДЎІ ўКЎ±Ў≥ўДўИЎІ Ў£Ў®ўЖЎІЎ¶ўЗўЕ Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ўДЎ£ўЖўЗўЕ Ў≥ўКЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓўЕўИўЖўЗўЕ ўБўК ЎІўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ЎЃЎІЎ±Ўђ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў± ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ўЕЎµЎІўДЎ≠ ўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕЎ±ўКўГЎІ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ЎђўКЎіўЖЎІ ўИўКЎ®ўВўЙ ўБўК Ў®ўДЎІЎѓўЖЎІ.
рЯФі Ў®ўКЎІўЖ Ў™Ў≥ўИўКЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎєЎІЎіЎІЎ™ ўДўЕЎ™ўВЎІЎєЎѓўК ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ўГЎІЎ∞Ў® ўИЎІўДЎѓўДўКўД Ў£ўЖўЗўЕ ўВЎІўЕўИЎІ Ў®ўЗЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДЎЃЎЈўИЎ© ўЕўЖ ўВЎ®ўД ўБўК 2018.
рЯФі Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ўИЎ•ўЖ Ў≠ўДЎ™ Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДўЕЎЈЎІўДЎ® ЎІўДўБЎ¶ўИўКЎ© Ў≥Ў™Ў®ўВўЙ ЎІўДўГЎЂўКЎ± ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ўЕЎЈЎ±ўИЎ≠Ў© ўДўЗЎ∞ЎІ ўЖўВўИўД Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎѓўИўДЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎѓўЖўКЎ© ўЗўК ўЕўЖ Ў≥Ў™Ў≠ўД Ў£ЎЇўДЎ®ўЗЎІ.
рЯФі Ў™ЎєўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎ®ўВ Ў®ўИўЕЎѓўКўЖ Ў®ўЖ ЎєЎ™ўИ ўГўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎіЎІЎ± ўДўДЎѓўБЎІЎє ўИЎІўДЎ£ўЕўЖ ўБўК Ў±Ў¶ЎІЎ≥Ў© ЎІўДЎђўЕўЗўИЎ±ўКЎ©... ўЕўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўДЎЯ
рЯФі ЎІўДўЕЎѓўКЎ± ЎІўДЎєЎІўЕ ўДўДЎ£ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўИЎЈўЖўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўБЎ±ўКЎѓ Ў≤ўКўЖ ЎІўДЎѓўКўЖ Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎіўКЎЃ ўГЎІўЖ ўЕЎ≠ўДўД ўЖўБЎ≥ЎІўЖўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўИўЖ ЎІўДўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© ўИўВЎѓ Ў™ЎѓЎ±Ў® ЎєўЖЎѓ ўИЎ≤ЎІЎ±Ў© ЎІўДЎѓЎІЎЃўДўКЎ© ЎІўДўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© Ў£ўКЎґЎІ ўБўК 2014.
рЯФі Ў•ўЕўГЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў™ЎЇўКўКЎ± ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎЇЎІўЖўК Ў±ЎІЎіЎѓўК Ў®ўА ЎђЎ®ЎІЎ± ўЕўЗўЖўЙ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎЃЎ®ЎІЎ±ЎђўК Ў®ўДЎ≠ўКўЕЎ± ўКўЖЎєЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў±ЎІўГ Ў®ўЕЎІ ўГЎІўЖ ўКўВўИўДўЗ ЎІўДЎ∞Ў®ЎІЎ®.

ar.title: Live Zitout |Ў≤ўКЎ™ўИЎ™ ўЕЎ®ЎІЎіЎ± ЎІўДЎЃўЕўКЎ≥ |18/03/2021
ar.description:
ўДЎІўКўБ 18 ўЕЎІЎ±Ў≥ 2021 Ў™ЎґўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЖўВЎІЎЈ ЎІўДЎ™ЎІўДўКЎ© :
рЯФі Ў≤ўДЎ≤ЎІўД Ў®ЎђЎІўКЎ© ўИЎђўКЎђўД ўИўЕЎІ ЎђЎІўИЎ±ўЗўЕЎІ ўИЎ™ЎѓЎІЎєўКЎІЎ™ўЗ. 
рЯФі ЎІЎ∞ЎІ ўДўЕ Ў™Ў≠ўД ўЕЎіўГўДЎ© ЎІўДЎіЎ±ЎєўКЎ© ўБўДўЖ Ў™Ў≠ўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃЎ±ўЙ.
рЯФі ўЕЎіўГўДЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥ўКўИўДЎ© ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎЄўЗЎ±Ў™ Ў®ЎєЎѓ Ў™ЎєўКўКўЖ Ў™Ў®ўИўЖ ўДўЕ Ў™ўЖЎ™ўЗўК Ў®ЎєЎѓ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКўЗЎѓўЕ ЎЇЎ±ўБ ўВЎµЎѓўКЎ± ўДўЕўИЎІЎЈўЖўКўЖ ўИўДЎІ ўКўЕўЖЎ≠ўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎ®ЎѓўКўД ўЕЎІЎ∞ЎІ ўКЎ±ўКЎѓ ўДўЗўЕ ЎЇўКЎ± Ў™ўБЎ™ўКЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥Ў±Ў© (ўИўЗЎ±ЎІўЖ) 
рЯФі ЎіЎєўИЎ± ЎєўЕўКўВ ўИўВўЖЎІЎєЎ© Ў±ЎІЎ≥ЎЃЎ© Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎђўЕЎІЎєЎ© ЎІўДЎ≠ЎІўГўЕЎ© ўДўЖ Ў™Ў≥Ў™ЎЈўКЎє Ў≠Ў™ўЙ Ў≠ўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎ®Ў≥ўКЎЈЎ©.
рЯФі ўГўКўБ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЕЎіўГўД Ў≥ўГўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў± ўИўЗўК ЎєЎІЎіЎ± Ў£ўГЎ®Ў± Ў®ўДЎѓ ўЕЎ≥ЎІЎ≠Ў© ўБўК ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўЕ.
рЯФі ўЗўД ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўЕЎє ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ўВЎІўКЎѓўК ўДЎіЎєЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎіЎєЎ® ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™ЎЈЎІўДЎ® Ў®ЎІўДЎІЎ≥Ў™ўВўДЎІўД ЎЯ
рЯФі ЎІўДўЖЎЄЎІўЕ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўК Ў±ўБЎґ ЎІўДЎІЎєЎ™Ў±ЎІўБ Ў®ўА ўГўИЎ≥ўИўБўИ (Ў£ўДЎ®ЎІўЖўКЎІ) ўИЎѓЎєўЕ Ў™ўКўЕўИЎі ЎІўДЎіЎ±ўВўКЎ© ўДўДЎІўЖўБЎЂЎІўД ЎєўЖ ЎІўЖЎѓўИўЖўКЎ≥ўКЎІ ўДўГўЖўЗ ўКЎѓЎєўК Ў™ўВЎ±ўКЎ± ўЕЎµўКЎ± ЎІўДЎµЎ≠Ў±ЎІЎ° ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®ўКЎ© ўИўБўДЎ≥ЎЈўКўЖ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўВЎІўКЎѓ ўЗўИ Ў£ўГЎ®Ў± Ў≠Ў±ўГўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўК.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎ™Ў≠ЎґўКЎ± ўИЎІўДЎ™Ў±Ў™ўКЎ® ўДЎ•Ў±Ў≥ЎІўД ЎІўДЎђўЖўИЎѓ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў±ўКўКўЖ ўДўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎ≠ўД ўДЎµЎІўДЎ≠ ЎІўДўВўИўЙ ЎІўДўГЎ®Ў±ўЙ ўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕЎ±ўКўГЎІ.
рЯФі ЎІўЖЎ™Ў≠ЎІЎ± ЎђўЖЎѓўК ўКЎ≥ўЕўЙ ўИЎІЎ¶ўД Ў®Ў±ўГЎІЎ™.
рЯФі Ў£ўИЎµўК ЎІўДЎҐЎ®ЎІЎ° Ў£ўЖ ўДЎІ ўКЎ±Ў≥ўДўИЎІ Ў£Ў®ўЖЎІЎ¶ўЗўЕ Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ўДЎ£ўЖўЗўЕ Ў≥ўКЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓўЕўИўЖўЗўЕ ўБўК ЎІўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ЎЃЎІЎ±Ўђ ЎІўДЎђЎ≤ЎІЎ¶Ў± ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ўЕЎµЎІўДЎ≠ ўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕЎ±ўКўГЎІ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ЎђўКЎіўЖЎІ ўИўКЎ®ўВўЙ ўБўК Ў®ўДЎІЎѓўЖЎІ.
рЯФі Ў®ўКЎІўЖ Ў™Ў≥ўИўКЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎєЎІЎіЎІЎ™ ўДўЕЎ™ўВЎІЎєЎѓўК ЎІўДЎђўКЎі ўГЎІЎ∞Ў® ўИЎІўДЎѓўДўКўД Ў£ўЖўЗўЕ ўВЎІўЕўИЎІ Ў®ўЗЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДЎЃЎЈўИЎ© ўЕўЖ ўВЎ®ўД ўБўК 2018.
рЯФі Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ўИЎ•ўЖ Ў≠ўДЎ™ Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДўЕЎЈЎІўДЎ® ЎІўДўБЎ¶ўИўКЎ© Ў≥Ў™Ў®ўВўЙ ЎІўДўГЎЂўКЎ± ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ўЕЎЈЎ±ўИЎ≠Ў© ўДўЗЎ∞ЎІ ўЖўВўИўД Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎѓўИўДЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎѓўЖўКЎ© ўЗўК ўЕўЖ Ў≥Ў™Ў≠ўД Ў£ЎЇўДЎ®ўЗЎІ.
рЯФі Ў™ЎєўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўД ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎ®ўВ Ў®ўИўЕЎѓўКўЖ Ў®ўЖ ЎєЎ™ўИ ўГўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎіЎІЎ± ўДўДЎѓўБЎІЎє ўИЎІўДЎ£ўЕўЖ ўБўК Ў±Ў¶ЎІЎ≥Ў© ЎІўДЎђўЕўЗўИЎ±ўКЎ©... ўЕўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ±ЎІўДЎЯ
рЯФі ЎІўДўЕЎѓўКЎ± ЎІўДЎєЎІўЕ ўДўДЎ£ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўИЎЈўЖўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўБЎ±ўКЎѓ Ў≤ўКўЖ ЎІўДЎѓўКўЖ Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎіўКЎЃ ўГЎІўЖ ўЕЎ≠ўДўД ўЖўБЎ≥ЎІўЖўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўИўЖ ЎІўДўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© ўИўВЎѓ Ў™ЎѓЎ±Ў® ЎєўЖЎѓ ўИЎ≤ЎІЎ±Ў© ЎІўДЎѓЎІЎЃўДўКЎ© ЎІўДўБЎ±ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© Ў£ўКЎґЎІ ўБўК 2014.
рЯФі Ў•ўЕўГЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў™ЎЇўКўКЎ± ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎЇЎІўЖўК Ў±ЎІЎіЎѓўК Ў®ўА ЎђЎ®ЎІЎ± ўЕўЗўЖўЙ.
рЯФі ЎІўДЎЃЎ®ЎІЎ±ЎђўК Ў®ўДЎ≠ўКўЕЎ± ўКўЖЎєЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў±ЎІўГ Ў®ўЕЎІ ўГЎІўЖ ўКўВўИўДўЗ ЎІўДЎ∞Ў®ЎІЎ®.

snippet.title: ¬°LAS HORMIGAS PINTARON A UNA LARVA! Primer logro de mis HORMIGAS de JARDIN
snippet.description:
¬°Hoy continuamos los experimentos con hormigas! Vamos a alimentar a mis hormigas con larvas y capullos, por supuesto utilizando el mismo sirop de colores y de azucar que utilizamos en el video pasado. Si nunca habias visto hormigas que cambian de color, pues estas a punto de ver algo increible. Vamos a ver un poco como viven las hormigas y su reaccion a este sirop de colores y a las larvas. Veremos como se alimentan las hormigas y les mostraremos los resultados inesperados en camara lenta. Ya no hay mas nada que contarles, solo vamos a comenzar de una vez con los experimentos divertidos y a ver a nuestras hormigas que cambian de color y ver que ocurre con las larvas. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

¬°Suscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

snippet.title: вЪљпЄП Chelsea 2 - 0 Atl√©tico de Madrid |  рЯПЖ UEFA Champions League
snippet.description:
#UCL #ChampionsLeague #ChelseaAtleti

Alineaciones probables

-Chelsea: Mendy; Azpilicueta, Christensen, Rudiger; James, Alonso, Kant√©, Kovacic, Hudson-Odoi; Werner y Giroud.

-Atl√©tico de Madrid: Oblak; Trippier, Savic, Gim√©nez, Lodi; Llorente, Koke, Sa√Їl, Carrasco; Joao F√©lix y Luis Su√°rez.

-√Бrbitro: Daniele Orsato (ITA).
-Estadio: Stamford Bridge.
-Hora y televisi√≥n: 21.00/Movistar Liga de Campeones.

En busca de la remontada
El Atl√©tico de Madrid visita este mi√©rcoles al Chelsea (21.00 horas) sabiendo que el √Їnico resultado que le vale para superar los octavos de final de la Liga de Campeones es la victoria, un resultado que logr√≥ hace un a√±o en la hist√≥rica noche de Anfield y que aspira a repetir para no despedirse de Europa.

M√БS INFORMACI√УN

El 11 de marzo de 2020, con las gradas todav√≠a llenas de p√Їblico, el Atl√©tico elimin√≥ al Liverpool, por entonces vigente campe√≥n de Europa, con una victoria en la pr√≥rroga (2-3) encauzada por Marcos Llorente, quien con un doblete se destap√≥ aquel d√≠a se destap√≥ como el todoterreno que ahora manda en el Atl√©tico y recibe la llamada de la selecci√≥n espa√±ola.

Un gran precedente en el que se puede mirar el equipo rojiblanco, condenado a la obligaci√≥n de ganar por culpa de Olivier Giroud. El ariete franc√©s sorprendi√≥ a Jan Oblak con una espectacular chilena en el destierro de Bucarest y dio al Chelsea ventaja m√≠nima en la eliminatoria (0-1).

Joao F√©lix, titular
Obligado a jugar al ataque, sin tiempo para especulaciones, Diego Pablo Simeone ha confirmado que alinear√° en punta a dos delanteros m√°s talentosos, Luis Su√°rez y Joao F√©lix, sin importar que el uruguayo cuente seis a√±os sin marcar fuera de casa en Champions o que el luso no atraviese su mejor momento, como √©l mismo ha reconocido.

Y es que analizando los √Їltimos encuentros, el Atl√©tico viene de quedarse a cero en Getafe y encadena nueve partidos en los que ha marcado dos goles como m√°ximo, un baj√≥n en la producci√≥n ofensiva que debe sacudirse si quiere tener opciones de remontada en Stamford Bridge.

Con la recuperaci√≥n de Jos√© Mar√≠a Gim√©nez, Simeone ya tiene a toda su plantilla disponible y opciones abiertas para decantarse por un sistema de dos o tres centrales, aunque la obligaci√≥n de vencer invitar a pensar en un sistema m√°s ofensivo con defensa de cuatro, lo que abrir√≠a la puerta de la titularidad a Lodi en detrimento de Mario Hermoso y a Sa√Їl √С√≠guez en la medular.

Los ausentes del Chelsea
Por su parte, el Chelsea tambi√©n viene de un empate sin goles en la Premier League, en su caso ante el Leeds United, partido en el que Thomas Tuchel regul√≥ esfuerzos al dejar fuera de la alineaci√≥n inicial a jugadores clave como el mencionado Giroud, Timo Werner o el exmadridista Mateo Kovacic.

El entrenador alem√°n s√≠ sufre problemas de bajas y adem√°s importantes, ya que no podr√° contar con dos titulares habituales como Mason Mount y el brasile√±o Jorginho, que podr√≠an ser reemplazados por Callum Hudson-Odoi y el campe√≥n mundial N'Golo Kant√©. Tampoco estar√°n por lesi√≥n el veterano Thiago Silva ni el joven Tammy Abraham.

El t√©cnico alem√°n ha pedido a sus jugadores que no especulen con el resultado de la ida y que demuestren "hambre" para ir al ataque, pero sobre todo eficacia ofensiva, reconociendo que ahora mismo es un punto d√©bil de su equipo. Adem√°s, desde el banquillo volver√° a verlo Kepa Arrizabalaga, que tambi√©n acaba de perder su sitio en la selecci√≥n espa√±ola al quedar fuera de la lista de Luis Enrique.

Con la recuperaci√≥n de Jos√© Mar√≠a Gim√©nez, Simeone ya tiene a toda su plantilla disponible y opciones abiertas para decantarse por un sistema de dos o tres centrales, aunque la obligaci√≥n de vencer invitar a pensar en un sistema m√°s ofensivo con defensa de cuatro, lo que abrir√≠a la puerta de la titularidad a Lodi en detrimento de Mario Hermoso y a Sa√Їl √С√≠guez en la medular.

Los ausentes del Chelsea
Por su parte, el Chelsea tambi√©n viene de un empate sin goles en la Premier League, en su caso ante el Leeds United, partido en el que Thomas Tuchel regul√≥ esfuerzos al dejar fuera de la alineaci√≥n inicial a jugadores clave como el mencionado Giroud, Timo Werner o el exmadridista Mateo Kovacic.

El entrenador alem√°n s√≠ sufre problemas de bajas y adem√°s importantes, ya que no podr√° contar con dos titulares habituales como Mason Mount y el brasile√±o Jorginho, que podr√≠an ser reemplazados por Callum Hudson-Odoi y el campe√≥n mundial N'Golo Kant√©. Tampoco estar√°n por lesi√≥n el veterano Thiago Silva ni el joven Tammy Abraham.

El t√©cnico alem√°n ha pedido a sus jugadores que no especulen con el resultado de la ida y que demuestren "hambre" para ir al ataque, pero sobre todo eficacia ofensiva, reconociendo que ahora mismo es un punto d√©bil de su equipo. Adem√°s, desde el banquillo volver√° a verlo Kepa Arrizabalaga, que tambi√©n acaba de perder su sitio en la selecci√≥n espa√±ola al quedar fuera de la lista de Luis Enrique.

snippet.title: GAZADVENTURES: FACE REVEAL
snippet.description:
Despu√©s de a√±os queriendo mostrar mi cara, aqu√≠ est√° el video donde la ense√±o.

me he hecho otro canal, suscribanse: https://t.ly/qnZz

Hice este video a contra-reloj, grab√© todas las escenas en 5 d√≠as y edit√© el video e hice los efectos especiales en 4.

Al principio iba hasta contratar al actor de doblaje original de Elliot, pero el presupuesto se iba demasiado. Depend√≠a constantemente de mis amigos, los cuales trabajaban y no pod√≠an venir todos los d√≠as que necesitaba, lo cual atras√≥ las grabaciones y solo nos dejaba unas franjas horarias especificas para grabar, as√≠ que ten√≠amos que hacerlo r√°pido, porque cuando el sol empezaba a irse y hab√≠a poca luz, las escenas quedaban inservibles.
Aunque me tuve que encargar del 90% de todo lo relacionado a este proyecto, sin ellos, definitivamente no lo podr√≠a haber realizado.

Tuve que regrabar todo el audio de nuevo, ya que no ten√≠amos micr√≥fonos, as√≠ que a√±ad√≠ efectos de sonido foley aparte, para que el audio se asemeje lo m√°ximo posible al original, o al menos, sea medianamente realista.

Todo esto sumado a que es la primera vez que dirijo un cortometraje, y ninguno de los que participamos en este proyecto hab√≠amos hecho algo similar, ni estudiado cine o actuaci√≥n.

Me hubiese gustado tener m√°s recursos y tiempo para poder desarrollar este video al m√°ximo, pero a pesar de que no me convence del todo y dejando de lado como qued√≥ el producto final, me encant√≥ trabajar y dirigir este cortometraje. Espero que lo hayan disfrutado.

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

snippet.title: Zack SnyderвАЩs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMediaвАЩs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMediaвАЩs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: вЪљпЄП Real Madrid 3 - 1 Atalanta |  рЯПЖ UEFA Champions League
snippet.description:
#UCL #ChampionsLeague #RealMadridAtalanta

Alineaciones probables
-Real Madrid: Courtois; Nacho, Sergio Ramos, Varane, Mendy; Modric, Kroos; Lucas V√°zquez, Rodrygo, Asensio y Benzema

-Atalanta: Gollini; Tol√≥i, Romero, Palomino; Maehle, De Roon, Pasalic, Gosens; Pessina; Muriel y Zapata

√Бrbitro: Danny Makkelie (HOL).
Estadio: Alfredo Di St√©fano.

Horario y TV: 21.00/Movistar Liga Campeones. Como siempre, el partido podr√°s seguirlo en Carrusel en tu emisora de la SER, cadenaser.com, las redes sociales de Carrusel (Twitter y Youtube) y las aplicaciones m√≥viles de la SER y Carrusel Deportivo.

CONOCE TODA LA PREVIA
El Real Madrid tratar√° este martes de certificar en el Estadio Alfredo Di St√©fano (21.00 horas) su billete para los cuartos de final de la Liga de Campeones, una ronda que no pisa desde el a√±o 2018 y que tiene cerca tras el valioso 0-1 que se trajo de B√©rgamo, aunque no puede fiarse de un Atalanta que no dudar√° en ir a por la remontada sin nada que perder.

El gol de Ferland Mendy en los compases finales del Gewiss Stadium de finales de febrero da una buena ventaja a los de Zinedine Zidane para convertirse en el primer equipo espa√±ol en estar entre los ocho mejores, un estatus del que no puede presumir desde la consecuci√≥n de la Decimotercera.

El Real Madrid va por delante en la eliminatoria, pero no debe confiarse porque su ventaja no es muy grande y recibir√° a un rival que no llegar√° rendido y que tratar√° de ser lo atrevido que no pudo ser en su estadio, lastrado en parte por la temprana expulsi√≥n de Freuler y por el control que ejerci√≥ su rival.

El Atalanta sabe que la presi√≥n y la obligaci√≥n es de los de Zinedine Zidane que no quiere empezar a levantar el viejo muro con el que se toparon a mediados del inicio del siglo XXI cuando desde 2005 hasta 2010 no pudieron superar los octavos de final ante rivales de diversa entidad para luego encadenar como m√≠nimo semifinales y cuatro t√≠tulos antes de caer en las dos √Їltimas temporadas ante el Ajax y el Manchester City, en ambos casos perdiendo como local, con los ajacied tras haber ganado la ida por 1-2 y perdiendo por 1-4 la vuelta.

Los grandes partidos del Madrid
Para ello, el 13 veces campe√≥n tendr√° que ofrecer su cara de las grandes citas de esta temporada, en las que ha mostrado mucha m√°s fiabilidad. Zidane ya pareci√≥ pensar m√°s el s√°bado pasado en la visita de los de Gian Piero Gasperini que en el Elche y cerca estuvo de despedirse de la carrera por LaLiga Santander si no hubiese venido la reacci√≥n con los cambios.

El t√©cnico franc√©s rot√≥ de cara al Atalanta y reserv√≥ a sus dos jugadores m√°s regulares de la campa√±a como Kroos y Modric, lo que afect√≥ al engranaje del equipo porque ni Valverde ni Isco estuvieron finos. Y cuando el conjunto ilicitano marc√≥, les meti√≥ r√°pidamente junto a Rodrygo, y el equipo cambi√≥ inmediatamente su cara en la media hora final para levantar el partido con dos goles de Benzema, cuya ausencia en la ida en B√©rgamo tambi√©n la notaron los merengues.

El problema ahora para Zizou es ver como recompone al equipo por la importante baja de Casemiro, un futbolista que adem√°s de ser este a√±o un buen recurso ofensivo, es la 'red de seguridad' del equipo. El brasile√±o est√° sancionado y est√° la opci√≥n de poner a Valverde en su lugar para un 4-3-3, con la opci√≥n de adelantar a Lucas V√°zquez, acompa√±ado por Rodrygo, jugador con m√°s gol que Asensio o Vinicius, y que parece el id√≥neo para cubrir la en√©sima baja de Hazard.

Pero Zidane tambi√©n puede optar por jugar con el alem√°n y el croata como mediocentros, algo que ya ha probado en otros partidos de la temporada en los que no ha estado el '14' (San Sebasti√°n y Kiev) y probar con un 4-2-3-1, donde estar√≠a por ver quien ejercer√≠a de te√≥rico enganche.

El peligro del Atalanta
Lo que parece casi descartado es que Zidane repita tambi√©n el experimento de los tres centrales y que juegue con el capit√°n Sergio Ramos, que ya se prob√≥ durante m√°s de una hora ante el Elche, junto a Varane, con la posibilidad de Nacho como lateral derecho para dotar de m√°s consistencia defensiva de cara a frenar a un rival que lleva mucho peligro por los lados con sus dos carrileros.

El Atalanta querr√° mejorar su imagen de la ida, donde no pudo ofrecer ese f√Їtbol atractivo que le ha llevado a ser elogiado en toda Europa, perjudicado por la temprana expulsi√≥n de Freuler, la principal baja de Gasperini junto a la conocida de Hateboer, aunque tambi√©n tiene la duda en defensa del alban√©s Djimsiti, que de no jugar ser√≠a sustituido por Palomino.

Por su parte, el croata Mario Pasalic ocupar√° en el puesto del internacional suizo en el centro del campo junto a De Roon, mientras que parece que el veterano t√©cnico italiano volver√° a apostar por su dupla colombiana Zapata-Muriel para buscar la remontada.

snippet.title: James Corden Recaps the GRAMMYs
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show with a full recap of a huge night of the GRAMMYs, produced by his friend and Late Late Show executive producer, Ben Winston. After recapping everything from Harry Styles's suit to Beyonce's record-setting wins to Taylor's comfy A-frame cabin, James looks ahead to President Joe Biden's tour of the country.

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

localized.title: James Corden Recaps the GRAMMYs
localized.description:
James Corden kicks off the show with a full recap of a huge night of the GRAMMYs, produced by his friend and Late Late Show executive producer, Ben Winston. After recapping everything from Harry Styles's suit to Beyonce's record-setting wins to Taylor's comfy A-frame cabin, James looks ahead to President Joe Biden's tour of the country.

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

JUST LIKE HOME

AT LEAST LOCALS LIKE IT
